_comment: Stage-4 design+solution hook manifest. install pipeline materializes scripts to .claude/hooks/design.solution/<script>.py and merges hook entries into .claude/settings.json. Stage 单一性 + 修复必重审 + gate exit gating per plan §M3.1.

hooks.purpose: Set solution.contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true after solution.md edit so the pre-advance check fires.
Block harness gate/contract advance when solution.contract.yaml has pending_reviewer_recheck=true.
Block harness mission stage complete solution when gate run has not passed.
